readiness.summary: 7 issue(s) need review before this page should be considered launch-ready.

topIssues.title: Search engines do not have a clear preferred URL.
topIssues.explanation: This page is missing a canonical URL, which helps search engines understand the main address for this content.
topIssues.whyItMatters: Without it, duplicate or alternate URLs can be harder to consolidate.

developerDetails.rawDescription: The raw HTML does not include a canonical link.
developerDetails.fixStrategy: Add a canonical link in the page head or framework metadata config.
developerDetails.recommendation: Add a canonical link that points to the preferred public URL for this page.

topIssues.title: Missing og:url

developerDetails.rawDescription: Open Graph metadata should include the canonical page URL.

topIssues.title: The page does not have a clear main heading.
topIssues.explanation: ShipReady did not find an H1 in the page content.
topIssues.whyItMatters: A clear H1 helps visitors, assistive technology, and search engines understand the page topic.

developerDetails.rawDescription: The page should have one clear H1.

topIssues.title: Your sitemap address does not return a real sitemap.

fileChanges.title: Update index.html
fileChanges.writeBlockReason: HTML, metadata, and config updates are outside the V1 write policy.
fileChanges.diff:
--- index.html
+++ index.html
@@ -15,6 +15,19 @@
     <meta name="twitter:card" content="summary_large_image" />
     <meta name="twitter:title" content="MonGuide FODMAP" />
     <meta name="twitter:description" content="Votre guide alimentaire personnalisé pour le régime FODMAP" />
+    <link rel="canonical" href="https://mon-guide-fodmap.com/" />
+    <meta property="og:url" content="https://mon-guide-fodmap.com/" />
+    <!-- TODO(shipready): Replace with an absolute public Twitter/X image URL. -->
+    <meta name="twitter:image" content="TODO: Absolute image URL" />
+    <!-- TODO(shipready): Confirm this structured data before applying. -->
+    <script type="application/ld+json">
+      {
+        "@context": "https://schema.org",
+        "@type": "WebSite",
+        "name": "MonGuide FODMAP - Votre guide alimentaire personnalisé",
+        "url": "https://mon-guide-fodmap.com/"
+      }
+    </script>
   </head>
 
   <body>

safetyNotes: This ui-report command never writes files.
V1 safe apply is limited to creation-only robots/sitemap files.
ShipReady will not overwrite existing files in V1 safe apply.
ShipReady will not edit metadata, JSON-LD, page content, package files, or configuration in V1 safe apply.
ShipReady will not run Git operations, create commits, push, or deploy.
Dry-run only. No files were modified.
This is fallback metadata for the app shell. Route-specific metadata may require prerendering, SSR, or a later framework-specific strategy.
